form.formComment: Comes here off a 53-day let-up. Last start led to the turn then faded 8th of 10 at this track Bm56 on February 17 over 1600m, 6 len behind Proshow with 60.5kg at $16. The start before that raced on the pace before fading 7th of 9 at Cranbourne Cl1 on January 30 over 1500m, 6 len behind Late Harvest carrying 57.5kg at $31. This looks easier than recent starts but still has some ground to make up.
